7:
WITH seg AS (
  SELECT c.Segment,
         SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', y.Date) = '2012' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS sum2012,
         SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', y.Date) = '2013' THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS sum2013
  FROM yearmonth y
  JOIN customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
  WHERE c.Currency = 'EUR'
  GROUP BY c.Segment
),
pct AS (
  SELECT Segment,
         ((sum2013 - sum2012) / sum2012) * 100 AS pct_increase
  FROM seg
)
SELECT 'biggest' AS type, Segment, pct_increase
FROM pct
ORDER BY pct_increase DESC
LIMIT 1
UNION ALL
SELECT 'lowest' AS type, Segment, pct_increase
FROM pct
ORDER BY pct_increase ASC
LIMIT 1;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
